div.div:
Startup order in main.ts:
1. app.use(WebPlatformPlugin) — registers web defaults
2. loadPlugins() — runs new CapacitorPlatformPlugin() on Capacitor builds
→ calls app.provide() for each key (last provide wins)
3. app.mount("#app")

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
